Operation 'listCustomerSatellites' has semantic quality issues: missing_context. Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description could benefit from additional context clarifying what 'customer satellites' means (commercial/international clients) to help AI agents better understand the distinction from ISRO's own spacecraft and the scope of this data.

data.current_description: Returns a list of customer satellites launched by ISRO.
data.description_suggestion: Returns a list of customer satellites launched by ISRO. This includes satellites from commercial and international customers that ISRO has deployed into orbit.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate and action-oriented. Description could benefit from additional context clarifying what 'customer satellites' means (commercial/international clients) to help AI agents better understand the distinction from ISRO's own spacecraft and the scope of this data.
